PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elizabeth Fung for Linda Kesl (Petitioner).

Ms. Fung stated that she anticipates as soon as she can to file fiduciary return, that the forms come out in January and that hopes to have the return filed by April 15, 2020. The Court informed Ms. Fung that it typically does not advance more than 50% of the statutory compensation. The Court granted the Report on Status of Administration, etc. (subject to review of the order). The Court informed Counsel that it may revise the order and reduce the distribution amounts.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
